text:
(In reply to Andriy Gapon from comment #2)

> Can it still be reproduced if you drop all steps involving .zfs and snapdir?

Yes.


> Also, are fish and pwgen requirements as well?

No, I just used them to fill up the file.


> Can the problem still be reproduced if you use a different shell and different means of putting some data into a file (e.g., echo or dd if=/dev/random) ?

Yes.
